posts.hook: St. Johns County market update: June 2026

media.label: Added by Veronica directly on Facebook after posting

captions.facebook:
St. Johns County market update: June 2026

The June numbers are in. Home values remain strong, with a median sales price of $579,000, while inventory keeps growing, giving buyers more choices. Well-priced homes are still selling, but smart pricing matters more than ever.

Wondering what your home is worth in today's market? I'd be happy to run a complimentary home value analysis. Send me a message!

Veronica Wilen, Realtor
904-808-3737
Christie's International Real Estate | First Coast

posts.hook: What it's actually like to live in Nocatee

captions.facebook:
People ask me all the time what it's really like to live in Nocatee. Here's the short version.

Golf carts to dinner. Miles of greenway trails. A water park the whole neighborhood treats like a backyard. And a farmers market that turns Saturday mornings into a community event.

It feels less like a subdivision and more like a small town that happens to be brand new.

Thinking about a move to the area? I've lived here since 2016, so ask me anything. 👇
captions.instagram:
Living in Nocatee, in one post 🌴

🚗 Golf carts everywhere
🌳 Miles of greenway trails
💦 Splash & Spray water parks
🥕 Saturday farmers market

I've called Nocatee home since 2016. Questions about the area? Drop them below.

#Nocatee #NocateeLife #PonteVedraBeach #StJohnsCounty #FloridaLiving #MasterPlannedCommunity #realtor #relocation

posts.hook: A proposed park and library for Nocatee

captions.facebook:
St. Johns County has a proposed site plan out for a new park and library near Nocatee Parkway, and it's worth a look if you're in the area.

From what's been shared: ball fields, a walking path, a playground, an outdoor classroom, a book drop off, and soccer fields, all built around the planned library.

Nothing is finalized yet, but it's a sign of how much this corner of St. Johns County keeps investing in community space. I'll share more as plans firm up.

Curious how growth like this could affect your home's value? Let's talk.
captions.instagram:
A new park + library may be coming to Nocatee 📚🌳

Proposed site plan includes:
⚾ Ball fields
🚶 Walking path
🛝 Playground
📖 Outdoor classroom + book drop off
⚽ Soccer fields

Still in the planning stage, but exciting for the area. More updates as they come.

posts.hook: Things to do on the First Coast this weekend

captions.facebook:
Looking for something to do this weekend on the First Coast? A few local favorites:

🎣 Morning at the beach before the crowds
🍤 Dinner in St. Augustine's historic district
🎶 Live music around Nocatee Town Center

One of my favorite parts of this area is that there's always something going on. What's your go-to weekend spot?
